chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1436 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections 14 & 16. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.04.2025 Mr. Abdul Rahim Lakhani, advocate and Mr. Atta Mohammad Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate and Mr. Shamshad Ahmad, advocate file their Vakalatnamas on behalf of respondents, which are taken on record. It is jointly submitted that this controversy is squarely covered by order of this court dated 06.03.2025 passed in CP D 4318 of 2024, hence, this petition may also be disposed of for the same reasons and in the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
